title: ReelyShorts
hook: An app-style short drama product with white-label and commercial angles, blending product UX with premium promo and checkout flows.
sections: Frontend experience, white-label package positioning, JV materials, and premium conversion-oriented assets.
Packages short-form serialized content into a productized platform and potential resale / white-label opportunity.
App frontend, checkout scaffolding, public thank-you/download pages, JV package, and style explorations.
Founders, media entrepreneurs, creators, and businesses wanting a short-drama content vehicle or branded app experience.
Traffic -> demo/app experience -> white-label pitch -> checkout -> product delivery/onboarding.
Finalize env vars, package asset ZIP, and stronger proof/demo loops for the white-label sale.
